textByHash.ef648bc38a4e9d609c6ee6d87d674851fa318d2c: Good day, newcomer. My name is Terrova. I'm here to tell you about Magic. Let's start by opening your magic interface.
textByHash.37b260bd92634ea2c8e6a54f46523a8a25f24857: All you have to do is open the magic interface by clicking on the flashing icon.
textByHash.f5085c476df1ed0cfdba388cc1d4678910437c6e: All you have to do is open the magic interface by tapping on the flashing icon.
textByHash.819f919b314ddc1c91f65b7c7dd4d57cdad27750: Currently you can only cast one offensive spell called Wind Strike. Let's try it out on one of those chickens.
textByHash.9098f568f66c9bc441916e7ca896b389f27dd492: Sorry, I don't have any more runes just now. But I see you have plenty.
textByHash.8479f33340f8696ac7a8be6f82a754185a6e0538: Well, you're all finished here now. I'll give you a reasonable number of runes when you leave.
textByHash.bf4fcf3ad471591837362b65a2ab42ef463e295b: When you get to the mainland you will find yourself in the town of Lumbridge. If you want some ideas on where to go next, talk to my friend Adventurer Jon. You can't miss him; he's wearing light blue armour with
textByHash.a9721a6bc51e299f95d88fa8c567746fa24c0129: a huge sword. There are also many tutors willing to teach you about the many skills you could learn.
textByHash.b23415c700c83e9f9f8f0d6f6938fea9fb80fc86: Excellent, I think that covers everything. When you're ready to go, use your home teleport spell to teleport to Lumbridge!
textByHash.104879ab3bf448d04768683ea556c50bd29953a7: When you get to the mainland you will find yourself in the town of Lumbridge. If you want some ideas on where to go next, talk to my friend the Lumbridge Guide. You can't miss him; he's holding a big staff with
textByHash.26bfc98f7e74b1269db6c9eea4f781c85b220ade: a question mark on the end. He also has a white beard and carries a rucksack full of scrolls. There are also many tutors willing to teach you about the many skills you could learn.
textByHash.c601124ce2b19b173b1a8620d8e55f2b348bfc94: Were you planning to become an Ironman, by the way?
textByHash.f2abda855d1e3aac0d99a5a599027a705dfa7d6c: If you're interested in that, you should go and ask the Ironman tutor before you leave this island. He's standing outside my house.
textByHash.457fb7641deef3a9f2acf3423f7a09f816f97f7a: Were you planning to become an Ironwoman, by the way?
textByHash.cbdd54531dc25490dee063c659c8950ea9cab5eb: If you're interested in that, you should go and ask the Ironwoman tutor before you leave this island. He's standing outside my house.
